title: The SlenderMan
description: This mod brings a chilling new threat to Minecraft — the Slender Man...
body:
### The SlenderMan
Step into the shadows and feel the creeping dread as The SlenderMan stalks your every move.
This mod brings a new survival-horror twist to Minecraft — the longer you play, the more the Corruption spreads.
As Corruption rises:
1. SlenderMan draws ever closer, teleporting unpredictably around you.
1. Light sources are destroyed, leaving you in darkness.
1. Visual interference distorts your view and shakes your screen.
1. Escape becomes harder… and your paranoia grows.
There is no direct fight. No safe place.
Only you, the darkness, and the relentless presence watching from just beyond the fog.

Do you dare to survive the night?
